captions: The most extraordinary of all Vindolanda's letters - the birthday party invitation from Claudia Severa to Sulpicia Lepidina, the wife of Vindolanda's prefect. It dates to the period A.D. 100/104 and the closing salutation, in Claudia Severa's hand, represents the earliest surviving writing by a woman.
pages.text:
Unfortunately we walked out in a shower of rain & our legs got v. wet. We had coffee to warm up. There were diggers excavating with enthusiasm. We had lunch at the cafe + enjoyed the indoor museum. Recent excavations were started in 1938, the same as the Sutton Hoo.

Charles has sent a 4th of July video from the U.S. We have driven down to beyond Manchester for the night. Brook House Farm Middlewich. Wish more salt. There's a salt mining museum nearby. (until 1986)
